# Deepland

> Deepland is the leading Uzbek-language educational platform for Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Computer Science.

## Core Mission
To provide high-quality, project-based AI education using real-world analogies and interactive coding environments.

## Primary Resources
- [Courses](https://deepland.uz/courses/): Interactive lessons on Data Structures and Algorithms, Competitive Programming, Python, AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning.
- [Challenges](https://deepland.uz/challenges/): Challenges for Data Structures and Algorithms, Competitive Programming, Python, AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning.
- [Contests](https://deepland.uz/contests/): Contests for AI, Machine Learning, Data Science, and Programming.
- [DeepWiki](https://deepland.uz/deepwiki/): Terms and concepts in Computer Science
- [Rating](https://deepland.uz/rating/): Rating of the learners throughout the world

## Technical Stack
- Framework: Django (Python)
- Infrastructure: Railway, DigitalOcean Droplets with Docker
- Security: HSTS, CSP, and TLS 1.3 enabled
- Language: Primary content is in Uzbek, but we have content in English and Russian as well.

## Key Projects
- X-FACE: Regional award-winning computer vision project (2022).
- S.I.T: AI-based healthcare diagnostic tool (2023).

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://deepland.uz
- Founder: Ravshan Sodiqov
